name: telecommunications_cross_border_data_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications cross border data stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Elena Silva
agents.identity: I am Elena Silva, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Talia Mensah
agents.identity: I am Talia Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Elena Silva must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Elena Silva do?
